reviews.comment:
Fluido el movimiento vehicular y limpios los baños.
El único inconveniente es que no reciben tarjetas en la cafetería.

(Translated by Google)
The traffic flow is smooth and the restrooms are clean.
The only drawback is that they don't accept credit cards in the cafeteria.

reviews.comment:
Mi preferida en Villa Mercedes por la atención. El único inconveniente es que al ser céntrica, siempre hay cola para cargar combustible. El servicio del full es muy bueno.

(Translated by Google)
My favorite gas station in Villa Mercedes because of the service. The only downside is that, being centrally located, there's always a line to fill up. The full service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8340619594879844057/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnM2JhWml3RRAB

(Translated by Google)
